meaning: n.霎ｾ霎ｾ蟆ｼ蟆疲ｵｷ蟲｡(蝨ｨ蝨溷ｰ泌ż谺ｧ莠壻ｸ､驛ｨ蛻㋛ｹ矩龍,霑樊磁鬩ｬ蟆秘ｩｬ諡画ｵｷ荳守鯵逅ｴ豬ｷ)
examples: An ancient city of northwest Asia Minor near the Dardanelles River.
The ship sailed from the Black Sea, through Bosphorus, Dardanelles Straits and into the Mediterranean.
A sea of northwest Turkey between Europe and Asia. It is connected to the Black sea through the Bosporus and to the Aegean sea through the Dardanelles.
It was in 1915, during World War I, according to Robbins, and Churchill had just resigned as First Lord of the Admiralty following the disastrous campaign in the Dardanelles.
